description_long: This object is a large, industrial-style storage box placed on a wooden pallet. The box itself is constructed from red corrugated metal, giving it a robust and weather-resistant appearance. It is covered by a blue tarpaulin draped over the top and sides, likely for protection against dust, rain, or sun exposure. Four wide black straps tightly secure the box and tarp to the pallet, ensuring stability during transport or storage. The pallet is made of unfinished wood, typical for heavy-duty shipping and handling. The overall design suggests it is intended for outdoor or warehouse use, possibly for storing tools, equipment, or construction materials.
description: A large red metal storage box on a wooden pallet, covered with a blue tarp and secured by black straps. The setup is rugged and suitable for industrial or outdoor storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red corrugated box, blue tarp, and two black straps running vertically over the front.
description_view_1: Side view with the same features, but the corrugated texture and strap placement are more visible on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the same tarp and strap arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the right side of the box and the wooden pallet slats more clearly.
